text:
Plastic King プラキング - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Plastic King プラキング - This card when cast, allows the user to recombine the parts of this 1:1 scale model kit to build any kind of vehicle. It will be fully functional and operational. Fuel however, is not included.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.091 :: プラキング 
組み合わせ次第でどんな乗り物でも作ることができるプラモデルキット。もちろん１分の１スケールで運転もできる。ただし燃料は別売り。
|-
![Eng]
|No.091 :: Plastic King 
A model kit that can be made into any kind of vehicle. It runs perfectly. Fuel however, is sold separately.
|}
